findings.issue: Path traversal via unsanitized filename in upload path
findings.recommended_fix: Validate the file name to ensure it does not contain path traversal characters (e.g., '../') and use a secure file naming scheme, such as generating a random filename.

findings.issue: File type validation relies only on extension
findings.recommended_fix: Use magic bytes (content-type verification via libraries like python-magic) to verify the actual file type instead of relying solely on file extension.
Configure a retention policy for uploaded file audits, e.g., set audit.retention_days to a positive integer to enable automatic cleanup of old records.
